message:
feat(cli): Add repo opt-in and visibility controls

New commands to control which repos are tracked and set transcript visibility:
- `agentlogs settings` - view/modify allowMode (allowlist|denylist)
- `agentlogs allow [--public|--team|--private]` - enable capture for repo
- `agentlogs deny` - disable capture for repo

Config stored in ~/.config/agentlogs/settings.json (supports JSONC).

Also includes:
- Shared git utilities in @agentlogs/shared/git
- Visibility field passed to /api/ingest endpoint
- Server uses client visibility on creation, falls back to default logic

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/dkou6m46c3hsxq81qfjdj6wz
